description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun Fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park.Product DetailsRound toed shoe with central lace-ups and mesh overlaysPadded tongue and innerTough rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and a decoupled heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
